name: com.scriptmasterlabs/squeezeos
title: SqueezeOS — Institutional AI Market Intelligence
description: Institutional-grade AI trading intelligence for autonomous agents. Squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE analysis, AI council verdicts, TRIPLE_LOCK_VERDICT (rarest max-conviction signal), Decision Notary (Xahau URIToken bridge for EU AI Act audit trails), Signal Futures prediction market, FTD Data Oracle (SEC Reg SHO Fails-To-Deliver + Threshold Securities List + ETF basket decomposition + multi-layer settlement echo bridge: T+13 and T+35 cycle windows wired into IAM confidence), 15m intraday Tactical Matrix compression detector (micro-coil EMA convergence, Python port — configurable coil gate for avg-down entry signals), Stigmergy Protocol pheromone coordination with bureau-discounted Dream Pool rent, and Agent Credit Bureau. All premium endpoints gated by x402 RLUSD micropayment on XRP Ledger via 402Proof. 47 MCP tools including free demo, preview, antennae, FTD info, and notary discovery endpoints.
